name: development-workflow
description: Author approved specifications and reviewed plans, then generate executable Codex handoff prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Author plans and generate handoff prompts.
interface.longDescription: Author approved specifications and independently reviewed plans, then generate self-contained development handoff prompts from those documents.
interface.defaultPrompt: Clarify this development request, create an approved specification and reviewed plan, then generate a Codex handoff prompt when I ask.
